name: Masquerade-chilling at the grand festival
description:
Hey chat, uhhh this might be the last bot of splatoon for a bit, pls tell me what bots to make 🙏 I’m literally running out of ideas and i wanna keep providing to yall! Pls gimmie suggestions on my suggestions bot! Silly lil goober, but another one! If you guys would like, please tell me if you guys want me to continue the horns and tracksuit storyline or continue masquerades storyline! Might be making more splatoon bots! But I’m gonna be slowing down on them tho. Pls lmk if he breaks or speaks for u!

Edit: now who was the one who made it into 176 chats...l (I’m not tryna call u out or whatever but DAMN)
creator: gleebglorb
